questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
What is the patient's hemoglobin (Hb) level in g/dl?
Does the patient have malabsorption syndromes? (Yes/No)
Is the patient unable to tolerate oral iron? (Yes/No)
Does the patient experience severe adverse drug reactions (ADRs) to oral iron? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have cardiac compromise? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's weight in kg?
